top_signals.title: The last century was great for U.S. stocks, but the next decade might be challenging, says investing chief
top_signals.summary: High valuations and narrow concentration could present challenges for the S&P 500 moving forward, one expert says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities and cross-asset volatility.
